title: MLFFM-SegDiff: A Multi-Level Feature Fusion Diffusion Model for Skin Lesion Segmentation
abstract: arXiv:2606.26712v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: Skin lesion segmentation is a key task in computer-aided dermatological diagnosis, where accuracy directly impacts downstream analysis and disease classification. However, dermoscopic images are challenging due to blurred boundaries, low contrast, large shape variations, and artifacts such as hair and shadows. Recently, diffusion models have shown strong performance in medical image segmentation thanks to their progressive denoising and distribution modeling capabilities. Nevertheless, existing diffusion-based methods still suffer from limited cross-level feature interaction and insufficient boundary detail recovery.   To address these issues, we propose MLFFM-SegDiff, a multi-level feature fusion diffusion model for skin lesion segmentation. Built on a diffusion framework, the method introduces a dual-path U-Net encoder, a Multi-Level Feature Fusion Module (MLFFM), and a boundary-sensitive loss function. The dual-path encoder enhances

translated_title: MLFFM-SegDiff：一种用于皮肤病变分割的多级特征融合扩散模型
translated_abstract: 皮肤病变分割是计算机辅助皮肤病诊断中的一项关键任务，其准确性直接影响下游分析和疾病分类。然而，由于边界模糊、对比度低、形状变化大以及毛发和阴影等伪影的存在，皮肤镜图像具有挑战性。近年来，扩散模型凭借其逐步去噪和分布建模能力，在医学图像分割中表现出强大的性能。尽管如此，现有的基于扩散的方法仍然存在跨级特征交互有限和边界细节恢复不足的问题。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了MLFFM-SegDiff，一种用于皮肤病变分割的多级特征融合扩散模型。该方法基于扩散框架，引入了双路径U-Net编码器、多级特征融合模块（MLFFM）和边界敏感损失函数。双路径编码器增强了...
tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的多级特征融合方法，通过双路径U-Net编码器和边界敏感损失函数，解决了皮肤病变分割中跨级特征交互不足和边界细节恢复不充分的问题。
en_tdlr: This paper proposes a multi-level feature fusion diffusion model with a dual-path U-Net encoder and boundary-sensitive loss function, addressing the issues of limited cross-level feature interaction and insufficient boundary detail recovery in skin lesion segmentation.
